news.t: Get This Year's Ultrashort Bond Sweet Spot in TBUX
10 T. Rowe Price ETFs Cross $1 Billion in AUM
Karrie Gordon from The Active ETF Channel Announces Publication of "Active ETFs Gain Further Momentum in 2025"

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Ultra Short-Term Bond ETF (TBUX) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 1165.25m in AUM and 613 holdings. TBUX is an actively-managed fund that invests in a diversified portfolio of investment-grade fixed income securities, targeting an effective duration of 1.5 years or less. TBUX was launched on Sep 28, 2021 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
